subject: Dark-haired humanoid fighter in dark outfit wearing an ornate white face mask with pink markings, surrounded by purple energy
suspected_ip: Bardock (Masked Saiyan form, Dragon Ball Xenoverse / Heroes)
description: A humanoid figure with wild, dark spiky hair wears a dark bodysuit and a striking ornate white face mask with pink or magenta markings — the defining visual feature of this card. Purple and dark energy swirls around the figure intensely. The pose is aggressive and looming, with the figure's posture directed forward and downward toward the viewer, creating an encroaching, threatening compositional effect. The mask covers the full face, making this clearly a masked-identity presentation.
foreground: Dark-haired fighter in dark suit, ornate white mask with pink markings, purple energy aura
background: Swirling dark purple and black energy
